entries.source: "Explain derivatives step by step"
entries.value: "Azaldu deribatuak pausoz pauso"

entries.source: "Help with quadratic equations"
entries.value: "Laguntza ekuazio kuadratikoekin"

entries.source: "Solve 2x + 5 = 17 with me"
entries.value: "Ebatzi 2x + 5 = 17 nirekin"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Math Step Coach on inspir for stem learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Math Step Coach inspir-en erabiltzeko gida praktikoa, STEM ikaskuntzarako, promptak, ikasketa-zikloak eta AI ohitura seguruagoak barne.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: Ikasketa-ziklo sendoagoa

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: AI tutorea

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Eskatu lehen urrats txiki bat azken erantzunaren ordez.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Eskatu AIari zure arrazoiketa egiaztatzeko, ez emaitza bakarrik.

entries.source: Check each step.
entries.value: Egiaztatu urrats bakoitza.

entries.source: Choose a first move.
entries.value: Aukeratu lehen mugimendua.

entries.source: Explain why the method works.
entries.value: Azaldu zergatik funtzionatzen duen metodoak.

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Amaitu ideia oroimenez berriro idatziz.

entries.source: Learners who want to see why each math step works, not just copy an answer.
entries.value: Erantzun bat kopiatzeaz gain, matematikako urrats bakoitzak zergatik funtzionatzen duen ikusi nahi duten ikasleentzat.

entries.source: Math Step Coach
entries.value: Matematikako urrats-gidaria

entries.source: Math Step Coach For Solving Problems With Understanding is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Solve math by understanding each step. Your coach checks your work, points out slips, and builds confidence.
entries.value: Ulermenarekin problemak ebazteko Math Step Coach AI ikasteko erabiltzeko modu fokuratua da, erantzun-bilketa pasiboaren ordez. Modua lan zehatz baten inguruan eraikita dago: ebatzi matematika urrats bakoitza ulertuz. Zure coachak zure lana egiaztatzen du, hutsak seinalatzen ditu eta konfiantza eraikitzen du.

entries.source: Math Step Coach For Understanding: practical guide
entries.value: Ulertzeko Math Step Coach: gida praktikoa

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Probatzeko promptak

entries.source: Start the live mode at Math Step Coach. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Science Lab Partner. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Hasi modu bizia Math Step Coach-en. Alboko ikaskuntza-formatu bat nahi baduzu, probatu Science Lab Partner. Plataformaren ikuspegi zabalagorako, irakurri AI ikaskuntza-lagun batek guztientzat zer egin beharko lukeen.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Esan moduari zer ikasi edo ekoitzi nahi duzun.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Alde hori fluxuan agertzen da. Erantzun erraldoi bakarraren ordez, saiorik onenak ziklo batean mugitzen dira: helburua ezarri, zerbait probatu, feedbacka jaso, puntu ahula konpondu eta hurrengo ekintza aukeratu.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: Foku horrek axola du. Chatbot orokor batek ia edozeri erantzun diezaioke, baina ikaskuntza-modu batek elkarrizketari forma ematen dio. Ideia itsasten laguntzen duen pentsamendu, praktika, feedback edo esplorazio motara bultzatzen zaitu.

entries.source: The flow checks each step, points out slips, and connects procedures back to the concept.
entries.value: Fluxuak urrats bakoitza egiaztatzen du, hutsak seinalatzen ditu eta prozedurak kontzeptuarekin berriro lotzen ditu.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: Hau da AIarekin zeure buruari tranparik egin gabe ikastearen atzean dagoen ohitura bera: mantendu ikaslea aktibo. AI erabilgarriena da zure pentsamenduari buruzko feedbacka ematen dizunean.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Modu hau bereziki erabilgarria da honako hau nahi duten ikasleentzat:

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Saiatu urratsa zure hitzekin.

entries.source: Use Math Step Coach when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Erabili Math Step Coach azkar hasten baina oraindik zuri egokitzen zaion saio bat nahi duzunean. Lehen helburua ez da ikusgarria entzutea. Lehen helburua hurrengo urratsa posible sentitzea da.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: Modu honek zertan laguntzen duen

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Nora joan hurrena

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Zure benetako arazoaren bertsio zirriborro batekin ere has zaitezke. Lehen prompt nahasia ondo dago. Saioak maila, audientzia, epea eta estiloa argitu ditzake behin hasten zarenean.
